summary: REQ-8 requires updating the app header/top bar in App.tsx to display 'XetaChat' as the app name across both pairing and chat views. The diff shows App.tsx has been updated with an h1 element rendering 'Xeta' followed by a styled 'Chat' span (together forming 'XetaChat'), and the frontend-file-summaries.txt confirms the header displays 'XetaChat'. The requirement is fully implemented.
